name: foundry-gamesystem-scuvanya
description: Scuvanya game system for Foundry VTT

scripts.pack:races: fvtt package pack -n races -t Item --in packs/_source/races --out packs -v
scripts.pack:professions: fvtt package pack -n professions -t Item --in packs/_source/professions --out packs -v
scripts.pack:items: fvtt package pack -n items -t Item --in packs/_source/items --out packs -v
scripts.build:packs: npm run generate:packs && npm run pack:races && npm run pack:professions && npm run pack:items
scripts.unpack:races: fvtt package unpack -n races -t Item --in packs --out packs/_source/races -c -v
scripts.unpack:professions: fvtt package unpack -n professions -t Item --in packs --out packs/_source/professions -c -v
scripts.unpack:items: fvtt package unpack -n items -t Item --in packs --out packs/_source/items -c -v
